info.title: HRIS Platform API
info.description:
API untuk HRIS Platform Enterprise — modular monolith dengan multi-tenant architecture. Mendukung PostgreSQL dan MySQL.

## Authentication

Semua endpoint tenant (prefixed `/api/v1/tenant`) memerlukan JWT Bearer Token:
```
Authorization: Bearer <access_token>
```

Untuk mendapatkan token, login via platform endpoint.

## RBAC (Role-Based Access Control)

Platform menggunakan RBAC dengan 2 role:

| Role | Akses |
|------|-------|
| **super_admin** | Akses penuh ke semua resource platform |
| **company_admin** | Akses view-only ke company, user, license miliknya sendiri |

Endpoint yang memerlukan proteksi akan mengembalikan **403 Forbidden** jika role tidak memiliki permission yang sesuai.

### Permission Format

Setiap endpoint memiliki permission requirement dalam format `resource.action`:
```
company.view, company.create, company.update, company.delete
company.suspend, company.activate, company.terminate, company.backup, company.restore
user.view, user.create, user.update
module.view, module.create, module.update, module.activate, module.deactivate
license.view, license.create, license.update
monitoring.view
employee.address.create, employee.address.update, employee.address.delete
employee.contact.create, employee.contact.update, employee.contact.delete
employee.family.create, employee.family.update, employee.family.delete
employee.education.create, employee.education.update, employee.education.delete
employee.experience.create, employee.experience.update, employee.experience.delete
employee.document.create, employee.document.update, employee.document.delete
employee.insurance.create, employee.insurance.update, employee.insurance.delete
employee.employment.create, employee.employment.update, employee.employment.delete
```

### Company Lifecycle Actions

| Action | Endpoint | DB Cleanup |
|--------|----------|------------|
| **Provision** | `POST /companies` | ✅ Create DB + 106 tables |
| **Suspend** | `POST /companies/:id/suspend` | ✅ Deactivate connection |
| **Activate** | `POST /companies/:id/activate` | ✅ Reactivate connection |
| **Soft Delete** | `DELETE /companies/:id` | ✅ Deactivate connection |
| **Terminate** | `POST /companies/:id/terminate` | ✅ Drop DB + remove connection |

## Base URL

```
Development: http://localhost:8080
```
